_comment: Classification rules — Siemens-only, SequenceName-driven (heudiconv-style). Loose gates (just MR + ORIGINAL+PRIMARY). Best candidate chosen by closeness to 1mm isotropic. No timing checks. No description/protocol token checks.

common_gates._comment: Applied to ALL series before classification. Failing any gate = rejected. Kept minimal: only ORIGINAL/PRIMARY + Modality. NO voxel band, NO min-slice, NO description tokens — let any name-matched series through. Selection picks the best.

T1w.name: Siemens_T1_tfl3d
T1w._comment: Siemens 3D T1 family: 'tfl' followed by '3d' (with optional middle text). Matches *tfl3d1_16ns (MPRAGE), *tfl3d2_16ns (MP2RAGE), *tfl_me3d (multi-echo MPRAGE), *tfl3d1_ns, etc.

FLAIR.name: Siemens_FLAIR_spc_or_tir
FLAIR._comment: Siemens FLAIR family: spc (SPACE single-slab volumetric, used in 3D FLAIR) OR tir (TurboInversionRecovery, used in 2D FLAIR). Matches *spcir_278ns, *spc_ir, *spcR_278, *tir2d1_27, etc.

selection._comment: Tiebreakers when multiple series in the same modality match by name. Lowest isotropy score (closest to 1mm isotropic) wins; then NORM in ImageType; then higher SeriesNumber. With this design, a 1mm iso 3D scan will beat a 6mm 2D scan automatically.

output_layout._comment: Subject ID pattern (MRN+DOS) and MELD subject folder prefix. nnUNet dataset id and name are also configurable.
